headline: Pfizer Inc. (PFE) Announces Positive Topline Results From Phase 3 TALAPRO-3 Study of TALZENNA®
summary: Pfizer Inc. (NYSE:PFE) is one of the best undervalued stocks under $50 to invest in now. Pfizer Inc. (NYSE:PFE) announced on March 19 positive topline results from the Phase 3 TALAPRO-3 study of TALZENNA®, an oral poly ADP-ribose polymerase inhibitor, in combination with XTANDI®, an androgen receptor pathway inhibitor, in people with homologous recombination repair […]

headline: This 6.5%‑Yielding Dividend Payer is Sitting on a Breakthrough Investors Haven’t Priced In
summary: It’s rare to get such a massive high-yielder that’s also positioning itself for long-term growth. Of course, shares of Pfizer (NYSE:PFE) have faced immense challenges in the years that followed its COVID era peak. And while some rockier days might still be up ahead, the company has a lot of promising innovations in the pipeline. ... This 6.5%‑Yielding Dividend Payer is Sitting on a Breakthrough Investors Haven’t Priced In
